content: Nourish IA pass: review of macro-tracker progress feedback
Product Baseline T1 fires: calories logged vs target are two related quantities for the same day, so the screen MUST show variance + totals
Owner mandate: estimated-vs-actual is a required UX default for comparison data
Macro-tracker usability: without a running actual-vs-target, users cannot judge whether they are over or under mid-day (REPRESENTATIVE — slot real usability-study nugget here)
Today must surface progress-against-target, not just what was logged
Show actual / target / remaining per macro with over-under variance on the Today screen
Comparison must show variance + totals (Product Baseline T1); stay within the device-light perf budget
Today shows calories + each macro as actual/target/remaining with color-coded over/under
Use a macro ring + numeric delta (Hearth Works StatTile) for the comparison; pixel: ui_kits/nourish/TodayScreen.jsx
